blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot verify tier enforcement without runs completing with different tier settings. Runs are 'pending' status and do not show tier in UI.
Cannot verify port leasing - runs are pending and port shows '—'. Workspace path and branch visible but actual port allocation not exercised.
Budget cap pause behavior cannot be tested without running autopilot to budget depletion, which is not practical in a validation session.

improvementsFromRound5.description: Fix verified - commit 6a3db604 fix(autopilot): recordSwipe now creates planning artifact and delivery run on YES/NOW decision works correctly. Swiping YES on an idea creates a PlanningArtifact and DeliveryRun visible in Delivery Runs section with workspace, branch, idea ID, and artifact ID.

E2E product loop now works end-to-end. Complete flow verified: navigate to Autopilot tab -> create idea via form -> swipe YES -> delivery run created and visible. All 4 ideas are Approved and 4 delivery runs exist.

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 5 found recordSwipe action did not create delivery runs - root cause identified and fixed in commit 6a3db604. Round 6 verification confirms the fix works: ideas can be added, swiped YES, and delivery runs are created with proper metadata (workspace, branch, idea ID, artifact ID). VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 and VAL-CROSS-001 now PASS. Remaining blocked assertions (031-033, 035-041) require either: (1) runs to progress to completion states (031, 032), (2) budget depletion testing (033), or (3) features in later milestones (035-041 require advanced-execution and closed-loop-operations features).
